name: Memoclaw Skill
description: Memory-as-a-Service for AI agents with semantic vector search. Provides persistent agent memory with x402 micropayment model (100 free calls). Enables agents to store, retrieve, and search memories using semantic similarity.
review: 1504 downloads and 7 active installs demonstrate real-world adoption. Provides agent persistence with semantic vector search — a genuinely useful capability for long-running agents. x402 micropayment model with 100 free calls is practical and sustainable.
